abstract: This open metadata sample describes a qigong clinical trial in which breathing and movement practice may be associated with improved sleep quality and reduced stress. It is synthetic test data for pipeline validation, not a clinical source.
text:
This open metadata sample describes a qigong clinical trial in which breathing and movement practice may be associated with improved sleep quality and reduced stress.

The sample is included only to validate chunking, tagging, and retrieval-ready JSONL shape.
title: Sample qigong clinical trial metadata
